name: legacy-app-lifecycle
positive: @UIApplicationMain final class AppDelegate: UIResponder, UIApplicationDelegate { var window: UIWindow? }
adaptiveNegative: @main struct SampleApp: App { var body: some Scene { WindowGroup { ContentView() } } }
suppression:
// resizelint:disable-file RL008 -- Legacy lifecycle is required by the embedded test host.
final class AppDelegate: UIResponder, UIApplicationDelegate { var window: UIWindow? }
